name: @broadsheet/harold-preset
description: Opinionated voice bundle for broadsheet — Hitchcock register, Claude Haiku, ElevenLabs Flash v2.5, the Hey Harold wake-word, meeting-mode hard-mute, Italian-when-spoken-Italian detection, garbled-input filter, conversational memory. Sits on top of @broadsheet/voice.

scripts.build: echo 'harold-preset is built THROUGH @broadsheet/core (core imports it via the plugin registry) — no standalone build' && exit 0
